name: spellbook-skills
description: Personal skills library for daily workflows (worktrees + branch finishing, compile-only)

interface.shortDescription: Reusable engineering workflow skills, hooks, and reviewer agents for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Spellbook Skills packages reusable engineering workflows for coding agents, including worktree flow, branch finishing, review cleanup, TDD discipline, YApi lookup, Java DDD guidance, and a project context hook.
